content:
So because caro works by being stronger at low hp and even having skills that lower your hp. and then healing it back. Bottomless Scar kinda makes it just a bit harder to play. It doesn't make it impossible but just annoying.
I think a small addition to scar would make it better in caro with a simple change. Skills that lower your HP should make the healing required for scar a bit more. Like if leigh uses her 0 cost and removes like 50hp to get scar you now need to heal 25 more hp for example.
That's all.
thread_title: Small bottomless scar addition in Caro

content:
When Arachne Exalt, you're supposed to be invincible and receive all the damages in delayed form.

However there are some bugs that let you bypass the invincibility such as additional cast skills effects ( shown in the video ). 

There are also other times when her Exalt doesn't works at all despite also stacking the damage as delayed form ( shown in the replay code ).

thread_title: Enlightens Should Never Make a Character Worse

content: But i also usually play her on a team with a hand size wheel
thread_title: Enlightens Should Never Make a Character Worse

content:
<@184357317301501952> Agree. Optimal Horla uses retain and that's the reason you may want to deactivate her E2 whit teams that also rely on that mechanic.

<@298922504259502081> Yes, changing an Enlighten that no one wants is way easier than making a game changer Enlighten switch.
Playing Kath+Horla or Ghelot+Horla, with hand size WoDs and refusing to give my Horla her E2, I already run into hands that I have to burn Arith to free space or play some questionable action order to not waste stuff like Ryker's 0-cost or Insights. I really don't like hand clogging and may be making a big deal out of slightly worse results though...
I'm always impressed by your D-Tide clears btw. ~~ I'm starting to think that we may not have the same Morimens installed~~

Anyway; I don't think Horla's E2 is always bad (but can be) and that's the point.
thread_title: Enlightens Should Never Make a Character Worse

thread_title: Ridiculous rewards in PVP after 2.5 patch

content:
About the facts I wrote:

1&2. "Expiring rewards is a disguised form of punishments which exploits the human nature of people hating loss." That's an existing theory, not something I made up. You may search the term "Loss Aversion" for more and see how it works in game design. I won't debate more if you take a theory as an opinion.

3. "PVE is the SOLE PRIMARY MODE, which the business model of Morimens is based on." That's a simple fact, just calculate how much a player should pay to get all PVE contents.

4. "...few monetization point‌s in PVP mode in Morimens. Thus 'PVP is a BONUS MODE'..." Also a simple fact, how much should a player pay to get all PVP contents? And 'PVP is a BONUS MODE' is in the rule box, you can read it in game.

5&6. Aren't they facts? They did remove emotes, and they provides material for upgrading characters. Does Upgrading works in PVP mode?

I really did take another look at what i wrote, and i don't know why you said, quote "all these facts you wrote down are not facts and are opinions"?
thread_title: Ridiculous rewards in PVP after 2.5 patch

content:
It's totally fine when PVP players get rewards, the more the better, but the rewards should works only in PVP mode. 

Imagine they add a Xiangqi (Chinese chess) mini-game in Morimens, and you need to compete with all other players to get what you need for you PVE progress and some fancy looking for Traphase. Is that a decent idea to you?
thread_title: Ridiculous rewards in PVP after 2.5 patch

content:
Except the rewards aren’t just locked to pvp 
Literally every other game mode now is giving you the same rewards
thread_title: Ridiculous rewards in PVP after 2.5 patch

content:
I just came across this post recently, as a player who played Traphase for quite a long time by now i can say this:

- New leaderboard is quite FOMO, a lot of players used to hate that leaderboard rewards for a reason, this is why there was a drama related to someone in the CN community bragging about 37k points for Pdive and there was a breach into the non-written rules of not going above 36k points in Aequor + Ultra realm leaderboard ( people could still  technically go above 36k but just don't brag about it, it would have been fine ).
36k points was easily reachable for newbies and veterans alike btw. The other people from the CN community were very chill about letting everyone farm there and it was fine for a long time too btw.

After the revamp of the leaderboard they went into roses currency + tickets to randomly get emotes on the leaderboard rewards and it was still shared across Pdive + traphase.

- Currently it doesn't reward players for their hardwork in PVP too, it's just Helot team meta, there is a reason why people hate PVP and it's because of meta team one shoting everyone else without much thinking, you must think the devs just need to nerf some stuffs to balance things out and make it fair to play PVP right? There was not a real single nerf over the past year against helot, in fact they kept buffing her despite multiple complain and evidence of helot team being brain dead and winning, now with Arachne's release it's just impossible to win unless you RNG diff them ( they generally kills you in 2 or 3 turns btw, the video gives you the proof, it also now counter rewind posse + barrier + shield + any death related wheel with arachne's exalt ).
thread_title: Ridiculous rewards in PVP after 2.5 patch

It's true but the problem is  that we kind of need to look at current leaderboard on other gamemodes

thread_title: Ridiculous rewards in PVP after 2.5 patch

content:
Since they changed to 150 cards played, it's not so bad.
But "not so bad" still quite bad for anyone that got into the game thanks to PVE and hates PVP, so I'm here to say what I've been saying many other times:

-We just need something akin to a "shared reward pool" that we can pick our favorite mode (or modes) and play it to get rewards. This way whoever likes Traphase can keep playing it and getting rewards while the other part that want to avoid Traphase doesn't have to suffer.

(Rank rewards also need to change, but that's another talk...)
thread_title: Ridiculous rewards in PVP after 2.5 patch
